channel.title: UTF-8s' Blog
channel.description: 海内存知己，天涯若比邻。

item.title: 我的自我介绍Self-introduction
item.description:
### Hi there 👋
Nice to meet you!😋
🇨🇳 I'm a Chinese. 🔭 I'm currently watching videos on bilibili. 🌱 I’m currently learning C++. 🤔 I’m looking for help with me.🎃 💬 Ask me about C++. 📫 How to reach me: QQ:2733511912 email:2733511912@qq.com wechat:IamUTF-8s 😄 Pronouns: Unicode ⚡ Fun fact: NULL The end。
